name: Spellstriker Staff (Major)
description:
A spellstriker staff is wrought iron with gleaming arcane sigils etched into its surface and a sharp point at the bottom. Used as a weapon, the staff is a +2 greater striking shifting staff.

Activate F (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You use Spellstrike with a non-cantrip spell and miss with the Strike

Effect An explosion of magical energy—stored up for the Spellstrike—explodes out. All creatures in a take 1d6 damage per rank of the spell, with a save against your spell DC. This damage is the same type the spell would have dealt, and the activation gains that trait; if the spell would have dealt multiple types of damage, choose one of them. If the damage of the explosion is mental, the save is instead of Reflex.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip
  • 1st ,
  • 2nd ,
  • 3rd ,
  • 4th ,
  • 5th , ,
  • 6th ,
  • 7th ,

Craft Requirements You have the magus's Spellstrike activity. Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.
